args.comment: Both services confirmed on patched versions; patching-complete email sent.

args.text: Credential rotation checklist completed: active refresh tokens invalidated, signing keys rotated, old keys confirmed rejected.

args.subject: Please sign in again after tonight's security maintenance
args.body: As part of tonight's security maintenance (CVE-2026-30117 remediation), auth-api and session-store were patched and credentials were rotated. Please sign in again — you may be prompted to re-authenticate.

args.comment: Credentials rotated, staff notified, register updated.
